---
name: Bug report
description: Report a Nyx beta bug, crash, freeze, routing problem, installer issue, or broken behavior
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Before submitting

- Check [KNOWN_ISSUES.md](../../KNOWN_ISSUES.md) and existing open issues for duplicates.
- Remove passwords, API keys, private documents, serial numbers, and sensitive local paths.
- Do not attach a full raw diagnostic archive publicly unless every field has been reviewed and sanitized.

## What happened?

Describe the visible result, exact error text, and whether the app remained usable.

## What did you expect?

Describe the intended behavior.

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Exact prompt or action

Paste the exact prompt, button sequence, or installer step when relevant.

## Screenshot or sanitized error text

Drag files here only after removing sensitive information.

- Cold-load time, if observed:

- Did Stop work?
- Did the next prompt work?
- Did restart or Resume recover the same project/run?

## Extra notes

Include a sanitized log excerpt or diagnostic summary when useful. Link related issues rather than duplicating full private machine data.
